message:
test(frankenpandas): add DataFrame Introspection integration test (br-mle2r / fd90.176)

fd90.176: locks in fd90.175's dtypes()? Result-return fix and
exercises the broader introspection API documented in the README's
'DataFrame Introspection' section (lines 1145-1167).

Builds a 3-row 2-column DataFrame and verifies:
  - df.shape() returns (3, 2)
  - df.dtypes()? returns a Series of length 2 (fd90.175 fix —
    was wrongly documented as Vec<(String, DType)>)
  - df.info() returns a String containing column names
  - df.memory_usage()? returns a Series with at least 2 entries
  - df.ndim() returns 2 (always 2 for DataFrame)
  - df.axes() returns (Vec<IndexLabel> of len 3, Vec<String> of len 2)
  - df.is_empty() returns false for non-empty
  - df.equals(&df_clone) returns true
  - df.compare(&df_clone)? returns a DataFrame

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 18 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
